compiled_state.title: sprint/pre-agent.sh: worktree.isolation_enabled=true -> isolation still blocked by pre-agent hook
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: dso:sprint dispatches sub-agents without worktree isolation even though the worktree isolation feature epic was completed and a previous bug fix was applied. The pre-agent hook blocks isolation with: 'Worktree isolation is disabled for sub-agents. Sub-agents must share the orchestrator\'s working directory.' This contradicts the expected state where worktree.isolation_enabled=true in dso-config.conf should enable per-sub-agent worktree sandboxing. Need to investigate: (1) check worktree.isolation_enabled in .claude/dso-config.conf, (2) check pre-agent.sh hook logic, (3) check if epic completion left the feature partially wired.
